title: break fast
body:
record break fast lyrics

i couldn't find anything to eat
i tried all the games, i goddamn plate everything i could see
i could see i was hungry
i could see i was tired
i could see i couldn't [stomach](stomach) this cuz the way that i'm wired
when fed i'm a fire
the higher i get the more i make everything brighter
but the heat is intense
they can't just let me run wild
but if you can't sweat me it's wetter weather
whenever i come to your island
at night i'm a memory smilin
can't see the dreams that you send to me
while i'm dying of entropy
but from my gut up
starting at sun up
i can't shut up
no quiet while i'm grinding my grit up
lit up
it sparks when i let it sing
so i'm a cut up whatever part that's in front of me
get up when it's still dark if i wanna hunt
for something i won't spit up when i need carbs for actin
like i want something different than whatever this was
